title: Activation Event Tracking via Server and Client Side
description: Implement activation event tracking both server-side (for Zapier webhooks) and client-side (for marketing automation integration). The activation event is a key milestone that fires when a user completes a significant action, enabling conversion tracking across the marketing and product analytics stack.
acceptance_criteria: Activation event fires server-side to Zapier webhook
Activation event fires client-side for marketing automation tools
Event data includes user identification details
middleware_changes: Server-side activation event trigger sends webhook to Zapier. Client-side event firing integrated with marketing automation tools.
implementation_notes: Description was partially truncated in Jira. Event implemented and deployed to staging for review.
comment_summary: Developer confirmed implementation complete on staging.
